todayPlan.title: Your Study Plan for Today
todayPlan.description: These tasks have been prepared for you by the AI.

upcomingDeadlines.title: Upcoming Deadlines
upcomingDeadlines.description: An overview of your upcoming assignments and tests.

mySubjects.title: Your Subjects
mySubjects.description: A quick overview of your subjects.

tools.title: AI-Powered Tools
tools.description: Your suite of intelligent tools to accelerate learning.

quiz.description: Create multiple-choice quizzes from any text. Test your knowledge with various challenging modes.

flashcards.description: Automatically generate flashcards from your study materials to reinforce key concepts.

material.description: Get a concise summary of any uploaded document or pasted text to quickly grasp the main points.

material.title: Process Material
material.description: Upload files or paste text to generate summaries, flashcards, and more.
material.importDescription: Provide a file, paste text, or both. The AI will use text as context for the file.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.description: Your consolidated calendar of deadlines, tasks, and personal appointments.
agenda.noEvents: No events scheduled for this day.

studyPlan.createDescription: Let the AI create a structured, day-by-day plan to help you prepare. Provide some details for the best results.
studyPlan.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., 'History test about the Roman Empire, chapters 4 and 5.'
studyPlan.fileUploadHint: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file (max 5MB).
